channel.title: Sentinel Lite on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Sentinel Lite on Tech Tracker

item.title: Sentinel Lite - A de-centralised VPN for more security and privacy on the go.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-jwH2XM4Dw7I/YdW97fwfIeI/AAAAAAAAIT0/uQ90Ie9HTYEqSxDdwOxUj_FZEHMNqy9DACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1641397736912924-0.png" alt=""> VPN - Virtual private network is essential and necessary for security and privacy of personal data either on smartphone or pc this is why we have many VPN apps from numerous companies and individual dev’s to safeguard and protect users from virus , trackers, hackers, malwares so they won’t snoop into your personal data. However, majority of smartphone and pc users doesn’t even know about VPN even if they know they struggle to find best free VPN as most highly secured VPN apps are not available for free, even if the paid VPN apps or softwares available for free most of them put certain restrictions, even only provide you VPN on trail basis for 1 week or month which is not satisfactory.
